revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-1-720

Second-channel frequency

In heterodyne reception, a frequency, other than that to which the receiver is tuned, which    is such that the difference between this frequency and that of a local oscillator in the receiver is a frequency lying within the pass band of an intermediate-frequency amplifier in the receiver, in which it produces an unwanted response.

Reference: B.S. (modified)

{{IALAFooter}}
